title: justicia austrocapensis
intro: Justicia austrocapensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the blue trumpet vine or trumpet flower. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Justicia austrocapensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
